description: Jarvis pushed a PDF to reMarkable directly via rmapi instead of routing through Knox, who owns the remarkable-upload skill. Knox has explicit task portfolio entries for both remarkable-sync and remarkable-upload.
correction: All reMarkable interactions (upload and sync) must route through Knox. Jarvis coordinates; Knox executes device operations.
systemic_fix: Any 'push to reMarkable' or 'pull from reMarkable' request routes to Knox. Same pattern as err-20260321-003 — Jarvis must not execute agent-owned skills directly.
